name: web-sdk-v3.0
description: Web SDK v3.0 — breaking-change release. Owns the bitemporal `interface` attribute (narrative shape for docs) and the bitemporal `interface_canonical` attribute (operations/events/fields shape the breaking-change advisor diffs) with BOTH v2 and v3 rows in each, so `?as_of=` queries return the correct contract for the requested time. Also carries the v3 release note + migration guide.

facts.title: v3.0.0 release notes
facts.body:
**v3.0.0 — Breaking-change release**. Headline changes:

- `auth.getUserIdentity()` is now **async** and returns a **richer shape** including `roles`, `scopes`, `entitlements`, and `tokenExpiresAt`. Unauthenticated callers now get a thrown `UnauthenticatedError` instead of a `null` return.
- All read APIs are now Promise-returning. `prefs.get` and `auth.isSignedIn` lost their sync variants.
- New `runtime` module: integrates with Web Runtime to expose zone configs, slot replacements, and entitlement checks.
- `init()` is now async and returns the SDK instance; the singleton import (`import { sdk } from '@digital-platform/web-sdk'`) is still available for code that prefers it.
- Peer-dep bump: React 18.0+ required (React 17 is dropped).

Full migration steps are in the `migration_guide` fact on this capability.

facts.title: Migrating from Web SDK v2 to v3

entrypoint.name: init
entrypoint.description: Synchronous boot. Call once at app startup before any other SDK call.

members.name: signOut
members.description: Revoke local session + redirect to signout.

members.name: getUserIdentity
members.description: Synchronous-style call returning a SLIM user-identity from the cached session, or `null` when not signed in. No network round-trip.

members.name: isSignedIn
members.description: Synchronous check against the cached session.

members.name: get
members.description: Synchronous read from the in-memory cache.

members.name: load
members.description: Fetch the full preference set into the cache.

entrypoint.name: init
entrypoint.description: ASYNC boot in v3 (was sync in v2). Resolves once the SDK has loaded the session, primed the preferences cache, and — when `runtime.enabled` is true — fetched the Web Runtime config.

runtime.description: NEW IN v3. When enabled, the SDK fetches Web Runtime config at boot and exposes it via `sdk.runtime.*`.

members.name: signIn
members.description: Now returns a Promise resolving after the OIDC redirect (v2 returned void).

members.name: getUserIdentity
members.description: **BREAKING in v3**: now async. Returns a Promise resolving to the **rich** UserIdentity (was a slim sync return in v2). Rejects with `UnauthenticatedError` when not signed in (v2 returned `null`). Pass `force_refresh: true` for a server round-trip.

entitlements.description: NEW in v3. Names of entitlements granted via Web Runtime's audience-segmentation.

throws.when: User is not signed in. v2 equivalent: a `null` return.
Identity service unreachable and the cached identity is stale.

modules.name: runtime
modules.description: NEW MODULE IN v3. Exposes Web Runtime config: zones, slots, menus, entitlement checks.

members.name: config
members.description: Return the runtime config the platform resolved for this user + tenant + audience match.

members.name: zone
members.description: Return a specific zone's config (header, sidebar, content-frame, footer).

members.name: hasEntitlement
members.description: Check whether the current user has a named entitlement.
